privileged_info_summary: The task is a Jenkins credential management automation task where an agent must add a 'Username with password' credential to Jenkins with three key attributes: credential ID 'deploy-credentials', username 'deploy-user', and description 'Deployment server credentials'. These are synthetic test credentials, not sourced from external data. The verifier.py script validates that all three attributes match exactly after the credential is created. The task also specifies a password 'S3cureP@ss' (not in metadata) and requires login with admin credentials 'admin/Admin123!'.
